If you installed /memory and got stuck at the Obsidian step, this is the missing layer.

youtube_short.title: Why AI agents forget and how to fix it
youtube_short.description: A short preview of AI Memory Systems, the course behind /memory. Learn HOT/WARM/COLD memory, WAL safety, Obsidian sync, and weekly cleanup.

tweets.text: Most AI agents do not fail because the model is weak. They fail because context disappears between sessions.
AI Memory Systems is a practical course built around /memory: HOT routing, WARM topic files, and a COLD vault for durable context.
It also shows why WAL before compaction matters. If you do not write the important facts before summarization, they are gone when the session crashes.
You will wire Obsidian as the source of truth, sync across Claude Code, OpenClaw, and Gemini CLI, and learn a weekly ritual for keeping memory clean.
If you installed /memory but got stuck at the Obsidian wall, this course is the missing layer. $97.

linkedin_post.headline: Build the memory layer your AI agents are missing
linkedin_post.body:
A lot of agent workflows break for a simple reason: the team confuses context with memory.

In AI Memory Systems, I teach a practical stack for durable context: HOT routing inside the live session, WARM topic memory for active work, and a COLD vault for long-term recall. We also cover WAL before compaction, Obsidian as source of truth, cross-platform sync across Claude Code, OpenClaw, and Gemini CLI, plus a weekly maintenance ritual.

If you installed /memory and realized the hard part starts after the install, this course is for you.

email.subject: Installed /memory, but stuck at Obsidian?
email.preview_text: The free repo gets you started. This course gives you the full memory system.
email.body_markdown:
You installed /memory. Great.

Then the real problem showed up.

How do you structure the vault? What should live in HOT memory versus WARM topic files? When should you write before compaction? How do you keep Claude Code, OpenClaw, and Gemini CLI aligned without turning your notes into a mess?

That is exactly what AI Memory Systems covers.

Inside the course:
- Why agents forget
- The 3-tier memory architecture
- WAL before compaction
- Obsidian as source of truth
- Cross-platform sync
- TTL decay and the weekly memory ritual

If you hit the Obsidian wall after installing /memory, this is the next step.

**Enroll for $97**
